author: y4rr
content:
Landed GPU cuFFT dispatch for the four core 1-D ops; the remaining surface (hfft/ihfft, fft2/ifft2, fftn/ifftn/rfftn/irfftn, GPU pad/truncate) is split out to #605.

## Landed in this issue

### New module \`ferrotorch-gpu/src/cufft.rs\`
Six GPU-resident wrappers:
- \`gpu_fft_c2c_f32\` / \`gpu_fft_c2c_f64\` — batched 1-D complex-to-complex (Forward/Inverse)
- \`gpu_rfft_r2c_f32\` / \`gpu_rfft_r2c_f64\` — batched 1-D real-to-complex
- \`gpu_irfft_c2r_f32\` / \`gpu_irfft_c2r_f64\` — batched 1-D complex-to-real

Pattern (\`/rust-gpu-discipline\` clean):
- Take \`&CudaBuffer<T>\`, return \`CudaBuffer<T>\` (no host bounce)
- Plan via \`cufftPlan1d\` (batch-aware), execute via lower-level \`result::exec_*\` raw-pointer API
- Layout: workspace's interleaved \`[..., n, 2]\` floats matches \`cufftComplex\` byte-for-byte — direct pointer cast, no reformat
- Inverse paths (ifft, irfft) apply \`1/n\` normalization via \`gpu_scale\` to match torch / numpy convention
- Stream-aware: plan binds to \`device.stream()\` so launches stay serialized correctly

### Wiring
- 6 new methods on \`GpuBackend\` trait in \`ferrotorch-core/src/gpu_dispatch.rs\`: \`fft_c2c_f32/f64\`, \`rfft_r2c_f32/f64\`, \`irfft_c2r_f32/f64\`
- Implemented in \`CudaBackendImpl\` in \`ferrotorch-gpu/src/backend_impl.rs\`
- Dropped \`NotImplementedOnCuda\` errors in \`ferrotorch-core/src/fft.rs\` for \`fft\` / \`ifft\` / \`rfft\` / \`irfft\` — they now route to GPU when \`fft_n == input_n\` (the common no-resize case)
- Pad/truncate (\`n != input_n\`) still falls through to CPU — pre-existing behavior preserved as documented fallback. Split out to #605.
- New \`GpuError::Fft\` variant + \`From<CufftError>\` impl in \`ferrotorch-gpu/src/error.rs\`
- Workspace \`Cargo.toml\`: cudarc \`features = [..., \"cufft\"]\` enabled

### Verification
- \`cargo test -p ferrotorch-gpu --features cuda --test test_gpu_fft\`: 8/8 pass under both serial and parallel threading
  - \`fft_f32_matches_cpu\`, \`fft_f64_matches_cpu\` — closed-form DFT of [1,2,3,4]
  - \`fft_ifft_roundtrip_f32\` — \`ifft(fft(x)) ≈ x\` end-to-end
  - \`fft_batched_f32\` — 2-batch case
  - \`rfft_irfft_roundtrip_f32/f64\` — real-FFT roundtrip
  - \`rfft_f32_matches_cpu_spectrum\` — bin-by-bin GPU vs CPU
  - \`fft_pad_truncate_falls_back_to_cpu\` — regression test for the dispatch gate
- \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions

## Out of scope → #605
- hfft / ihfft (Hermitian FFT)
- 2-D / N-D variants (fft2, ifft2, rfftn, irfftn)
- GPU pad/truncate (drops the \`fft_n == input_n\` gate)
